title: Performance Marketing Manager (f/m/x) - Berlin/Munich
required_skills: 1+ year Google Ads Search campaign management with track record of results
Tracking, measurement, and attribution model understanding
Interest in Meta and Microsoft Ads expansion
Analytical mindset with detail-oriented, independent working style
bonus_skills: Spanish / French / German / Dutch / Swedish language
matched_skills: Campaign analytics and ROI measurement (IPC: 4 B2B campaigns, 4.6M CNY revenue attribution)
Multi-market campaign performance tracking (GRG: EMEA + APAC markets)
Funnel and conversion analysis (Hapag-Lloyd booking funnel, IPC lead pipeline)
A/B testing & experiment design — listed skill
Stakeholder data reporting and structured insight delivery
B2B customer segmentation and targeting analytics
German B1+ (multi-language markets is a plus per JD)
missing_skills: Direct Google Ads Search campaign execution — HARD GAP (Boru analysed campaigns, did not manage paid search accounts)
Hands-on paid media buying and optimisation (bids, budgets, ad copy testing)
Attribution model implementation experience (technical tracking setup vs. analysis)
core_responsibilities: Own planning, executing, and optimising campaigns across Google Ads, Microsoft Ads, Meta
Analyse complex data sets in-house to identify growth opportunities
Manage and allocate budgets for channels
Generate and implement test ideas to optimise channels
Collaborate with Design, Marketing Automation, Controlling, Video Production
culture_keywords: AUTO1 Group (Europe's leading digital automotive platform)
recommended_emphasis: IPC: 4 B2B campaigns with ROI analysis tracking direct revenue impact — strongest analogue to campaign management
GRG: multi-market campaign performance monitoring (EMEA + APAC) — multi-channel budget allocation experience
Hapag-Lloyd: funnel & behavioural analysis — maps to 'analyse complex data sets to identify growth opportunities'
Acknowledge paid search execution gap; emphasise analytical depth and data-driven optimisation mindset as transferable
Power BI PL-300 + Qlik Sense — technical credibility for in-house analytics tools

company_info.size_raw: AUTO1 Group — Europe's leading digital automotive platform (wirkaufendeinauto, Autohero, AUTO1.com)
